description_long: This is a black four-door sedan with a classic, boxy design reminiscent of late 20th-century models. The body is finished in a glossy black paint, with chrome accents along the side trim and around the windows. The car features silver alloy wheels with a multi-spoke design and low-profile tires. The windows are tinted, and the side mirrors are mounted on the front doors. The rear of the vehicle includes a subtle trunk lip and horizontal tail lights, while the front is characterized by a simple grille and rectangular headlights. The overall appearance suggests a practical, urban-oriented vehicle suitable for daily commuting.
description: A glossy black, four-door sedan with chrome trim, silver multi-spoke wheels, and a classic, boxy silhouette.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, four doors, chrome trim, and silver alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the trunk, horizontal tail lights, and absence of a visible license plate.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, similar to the left, with clear visibility of the wheels and door handles.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the grille, rectangular headlights, and a clean bumper design.
attribute_wheel_design: Silver alloy wheels with a multi-spoke pattern, likely 5-7 spokes, and a clean, modern finish.
